import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import Layout from '../components/Layout'; import { bolgeAPI } from '../api'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; export default function BolgeDashboard() { const { user } = useAuth(); const [data, setData] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { bolgeAPI.getDashboard() .then(r => setData(r.data)) .catch(() => {}) .finally(() => setLoading(false)); }, []); const bolgeAdi = user?.bolge || 'Bölge'; return ( {loading ? (
Yükleniyor...
) : !data ? (
⚠ Veri alınamadı.
) : ( <>
🗺
